column8: Baseline: 11L×512d SP8192 GQA, QK5.25, depth recur, parallel resid, EMA0.9965, 4xA100 3600s. Pre-quant/post-quant BPB.
QK_GAIN_INIT=7.0 vs 5.25 baseline. Within noise (~0.0003). QK gain saturated.
NUM_LOOPS=3 (20 virtual layers). Slower (1.0M tok/s), fewer steps, worse BPB than 2-loop baseline.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.50 vs 0.72 baseline. Later warmdown start hurts convergence by +0.0025 pre-quant BPB.
MATRIX_LR=0.030 vs 0.022 baseline. Within noise. Post-quant slightly better but pre-quant slightly worse.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.80. New best pre-quant! -0.0006 vs baseline. Trend: 0.50 < 0.72 < 0.80.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.85. Best pre-quant yet! Trend continues: 0.50 < 0.72 < 0.80 < 0.85.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.90. Tied with 0.85. Plateau reached — 0.85 is the sweet spot.
WARMDOWN=0.85+MUON_WD=0.06. Trains faster mid-run but worse final: less regularization hurts convergence.
WARMDOWN=0.85+ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.20. Fewer steps (4641 vs 4989) due to longer slow phase. Worse by +0.0007.
WARMDOWN=0.85+EMA_DECAY=0.998. Slower EMA hurts pre-quant by +0.0023. 0.9965 is better.
1800s screen: SOFTCAP=20. Best screening result, −0.0014 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: ROPE_DIMS=32. Second best, −0.0009 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: GRAD_CLIP=0.5. Third best, −0.0007 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: SCALAR_LR=0.03. Fourth best, −0.0005 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: EMBED_LR=0.3. No improvement vs baseline.
1800s screen: MUON_BETA2=0.99. No improvement vs baseline.
1800s screen: TIED_EMBED_LR=0.05. Worse than baseline.
1800s screen: MLP_MULT=3.5. Worse than baseline.
1800s screen: PARALLEL_RESIDUAL_START=5. Worse than baseline.
1800s screen: SOFTCAP=50. Much worse, especially post-quant.
Full 3600s: SOFTCAP=20+WD=0.85. BEST RUN. −0.00282 pre-quant, −0.00231 post-quant vs SOTA defaults.
SOFTCAP=20+ROPE_DIMS=32. Rope32 doesn't stack with softcap20 (+0.0007).
SOFTCAP=20+GRAD_CLIP=0.5. GradClip doesn't stack with softcap20 (+0.0005).
SOFTCAP=15. Slightly worse than 20. Softcap=20 is the sweet spot.
SOFTCAP=20+SCALAR_LR=0.03. ScalarLR doesn't stack with softcap20.
SOFTCAP=20+EMA=0.997. Runner-up. Post-quant marginally best at 1.08830.
SOFTCAP=20+WD=0.80. Third best overall.
SOFTCAP=25. Worse than 20. Full sweep: 15 < 20 > 25 > 30 > 50. SC=20 confirmed optimal.
train_gpt_improved.py baseline. 35.9M params. ARTIFACT=15.96MB (FITS 16MB!). BPB worse by +0.003 vs 04_09 best.
improved.py MLP=4.5. NEW BEST BPB! But artifact=17.17MB (over 16MB). Need smaller model.
improved.py MLP=4.25. 37.4M params. Artifact=16.57MB (still over 16MB).
improved.py MLP=4.06. 36.3M params. Artifact=16.10MB (still over, worse BPB than baseline).
improved.py WARMDOWN_WD_MULT=1.5. Worse BPB, same artifact size. Extra WD doesn't help.
improved.py NORMUON=1. Within noise of baseline. Row normalization post-NS doesn't help.
improved.py ROPE_DIMS=16 (default=32). Worse than 32. Confirms ROPE_DIMS=32 is better.
improved.py GATED_ATTENTION=1. BPB −0.00146 pre, −0.00165 post. Artifact=16.05MB (52KB over!).
improved.py LOOP_EMBEDDINGS=1. Marginal pre-quant gain, worse post-quant. Not worth it.
GATED+CLIP=10. Best post-quant BPB! But artifact=17.46MB — tighter clip hurts compressibility.
GATED+CLIP=15. Fits 15.19MB! Best pre-quant. Loose clip hurts post-quant but saves ~900KB for more params.
GATED+CLIP=15+MLP=4.25. Best compliant run. Pre-quant=1.07589, artifact=15.75MB.
GATED+CLIP=15+MLP=4.35. **NEW BEST!** Pre-quant=1.07518, post-quant=1.09027, artifact=15.98MB. Fits 16MB with 24KB to spare!
